title: Andhra Pradesh ICET Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Andhra Pradesh ICET Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Andhra Pradesh ICET Result 2026 will be announced for MBA/MCA Entrance Exam on the official website - cets.apsche.ap.gov.in on May 16, 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the AP ICET result.

content.text: Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) will be releasing the AP ICET 2026 Results for candidates who appeared in the MBA and MCA entrance examination. The results will be declared for the 2026 academic session, allowing students to check their rank cards and qualifying status online.

AP ICET Result 2026 will be released online on the official website - https://cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/APSCHE/APSCHEHome.aspx. Candidates will be able to check and download their results by entering their hall ticket number and other required login credentials.
Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned on the result and contact the authorities immediately in case of any discrepancies.

sections.heading: Andhra Pradesh ICET Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Andhra Pradesh ICET 2026 results will be announced for MBA and MCA admissions under the 2026 academic session. Candidates will be able to access their rank cards through the official APSCHE portal using login credentials.

rows: Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE)

sections.heading: Andhra Pradesh ICET Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: APSCHE will activate the direct link to check AP ICET 2026 Results for MBA and MCA entrance exams. Candidates will be able to access their results and download rank cards through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Download AP ICET 2026 Result

items: Click on the "AP ICET 2026 Result" link on the homepage
Enter your Hall Ticket Number and required details
Your AP ICET result will be displayed on the screen
Download and save the rank card for future reference
